kept.text:
Tesla obsesses over the tiny details that make life ridiculously easier

“Close Windows on Lock” is the perfect example. Turn it on once in Controls > Locks and every time you walk away (or tap lock), any open windows automatically roll up. No more “did I close them all?” moments

These are the small conveniences most people completely miss. But once you experience them, other cars feel broken:

• Walk-Away Lock + Auto Window Close: Your phone key walks away. Doors lock and any open windows quietly roll up

• Walk-Up Unlock + Mirror Unfold: Car senses you approaching. It unlocks instantly and unfolds the mirrors. Feels like it recognizes you

• Automatic Cabin Preconditioning: Hit “precondition” in the app or set a departure time. The cabin is already the perfect temperature when you get in. It also preconditions the battery for faster Supercharging

• Dog Mode: Leave your dog in the car safely. Climate stays on and the big screen shows “Dog Mode: Keep AC on • 72°F” so everyone knows it’s intentional. Total peace of mind

• Camp Mode: Turns your Tesla into a luxury camper. Efficient climate + entertainment runs for hours while you sleep or relax inside

• Sentry Mode + Live Camera View: 360° security that records threats. Enable “View Live Camera via Mobile App” and check on your car in real time from anywhere

• One-Pedal Driving: Lift off the accelerator and strong regenerative braking slows the car dramatically. You barely touch the brake pedal. Smoother, more efficient, and insanely satisfying

• Bioweapon Defense Mode: Medical-grade HEPA filter + positive cabin pressure. Filters out smoke, pollen, exhaust, and allergens at hospital level. You breathe cleaner air inside than outside

• Voice Commands for Almost Everything: “Navigate home”, “Set temperature to 68”, “Turn on seat heater level 3”, “Fold mirrors”… it understands natural speech and controls nearly everything

These thousand little things are why Tesla ownership feels different

Other cars feel like machines. Teslas feel like thoughtful companions

Gavin Newsom spent years publicly trying to cancel Elon Musk

Called him “one of the great disappointments.” Slammed him nonstop. Tried to cut Tesla from state rebates

Now California’s entire electric truck future depends on the Tesla Semi - which just secured nearly 1,000 vouchers worth $165 million, far more than any other truck maker

The politician who worked hardest to destroy Elon is now quietly praying he keeps delivering the only trucks that can save his green mandates

California’s green future now depends on the man Newsom tried to destroy

You literally cannot make this up 😂

Did someone tell Ford CEO Jim Farley to stop praising Tesla (who’s eating Ford's lunch) — & start praising Chinese EV makers instead? 

Was the idea that no Ford buyer will support a Chinese EV company anyway? 

So pretend Tesla doesn't exist BUT pretend you are not pretending Tesla doesn't exist by praising Chinese EV companies instead so people don't think you're pretending Tesla doesn't exist by never mentioning them because you were tapped on the shoulder and told to stop praising Tesla because some potential Ford customers will check out a Tesla if you praise them and become a Tesla customer instead?

🤔

kept.text:
It’s always funny to me that Tesla shareholders believe I’m a “hater” when it comes to the Robotaxi program when the reality is that Tesla’s Robotaxi is underperforming even my own conservative expectations — expectations that were seen as ridiculously negative by $TSLA .

When Tesla launched the program in Austin last June, I thought that by the end of 2025, roughly six months in, Tesla would have about 100 unsupervised robotaxis operating in limited geofenced areas across a few Texas cities with minimal regulations. That was my “bearish” view.

We are now a full year into the program, and Tesla has around 25 cumulative unsupervised vehicles, with only about 17 of which were active in the last seven days according to the tracker, and they are operating less than 30% of the time. 

Tesla is in a worse position than even my own view, which was considered absurdly pessimistic by the Tesla investment community.

I can’t even say that I was right about how slow the Robotaxi would ramp, since it has been much slower than my own prediction.

But I was certainly way more accurate than Elon and most $TSLA folks.

Now there are some early signs of finally ramping up, but I have serious doubts that it will go hockey stick any time soon.

profile_bio.description:
Editor-in-Chief at @ElectrekCo
co-founder of @Combat_Edge_com, @Nesher_Canada, and @IxianEV

kept.text:
🚨 테슬라 중고차, 미국에서 ‘초고속 판매’ 기록

1️⃣ Tesla Model X
2026년 3월 미국에서 가장 빠르게 판매된 중고차로 기록
평균 판매 기간 단 26일 → 일반 차량(약 60일) 대비 압도적 속도

2️⃣ Tesla Model Y
평균 35일 만에 판매 → 시장 평균보다 훨씬 빠른 회전율

3️⃣ Tesla Model S
역시 평균 35일 수준 → 프리미엄 세단임에도 높은 수요 유지

4️⃣ 핵심 포인트
전반적으로 테슬라 중고차는 수요 대비 공급이 빠르게 소진되는 구조

quoted_tweet.text:
The Tesla Model X was the fastest-selling used vehicle in the U.S. in March 2026, according to a new study by iSeeCars.

On average, it found a buyer in 26 days, compared to the typical car, which usually lingers on the market for about two months.

Other Tesla models are also selling faster than most used cars. The figure for the Model Y is 35 days. The figure for the Model S is 35 days.
